title: READY 107 - Remote Pilot Test Prep
body_html:
<!-- ============================================================
     TRAFFIC COP LABS — READY 107 IN-PERSON COURSE PAGE
     Shadow DOM Isolated - WordPress CSS Protected
     One page per course, sessions listed inline
     ============================================================ -->

<style>
  html, body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: #0a0c10;
  }
  
  /* Force full width in WordPress/Elementor */
  tcl-ready107-inperson-page {
    display: block !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
  }
</style>

<tcl-ready107-inperson-page></tcl-ready107-inperson-page>

<script>
class TCLReady107InpersonPage extends HTMLElement {
  connectedCallback() {
    const shadow = this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });

    shadow.innerHTML = `
      <style>
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

        *, *::before, *::after {
          margin: 0;
          padding: 0;
          box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :host {
          display: block;
          font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
          font-size: 16px;
          line-height: 1.6;
          color: #F2F2F2;
          background: #0a0c10;
          -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
          -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
          margin: 0 !important;
          padding: 0 !important;
          border: none !important;
          outline: none !important;
          box-shadow: none !important;
          width: 100vw !important;
          max-width: none !important;
          overflow-x: hidden;
          position: relative;
          left: 50%;
          right: 50%;
          margin-left: -50vw !important;
          margin-right: -50vw !important;
        }

        a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
        button { font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
        img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
        ul, ol { list-style: none; }

        :host {
          --tcl-black:       #0a0c10;
          --tcl-dark:        #0f1218;
          --tcl-dark-mid:    #161a22;
          --tcl-dark-light:  #1e232d;
          --tcl-navy:        #1a2d42;
          --tcl-blue:        #3a7ca5;
          --tcl-orange:      #F5A623;
          --tcl-orange-dark: #d99520;
          --tcl-orange-dim:  rgba(245,166,35,0.15);
          --tcl-orange-glow: rgba(245,166,35,0.4);
          --tcl-green:       #10b981;
          --tcl-green-dim:   rgba(16,185,129,0.15);
          --tcl-cream:       #F2F2F2;
          --tcl-white:       #ffffff;
          --tcl-gray:        #6b7280;
          --tcl-gray-light:  #9ca3af;
          --tcl-border:      rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
          --tcl-border-light: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
          --font-display: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
          --font-body:    'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif;
          --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
          --ease-in-out: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
        }

        .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }

        /* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────── */
        .hero {
          position: relative;
          min-height: 85vh;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          padding: 100px 24px 80px;
          overflow: hidden;
          background:
            linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,12,16,0.55) 0%, rgba(10,12,16,0.96) 100%),
            url('https://trafficcoplabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ready107-hero-image.png') center/cover no-repeat fixed;
        }
        .hero::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background-image:
            linear-gradient(rgba(245,166,35,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
            linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(245,166,35,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
          background-size: 50px 50px;
          mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 40%, black 20%, transparent 70%);
          -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 40%, black 20%, transparent 70%);
        }
        .hero__content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 820px; }
        .hero__badges {
          display: flex;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 10px;
          margin-bottom: 24px;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) both;
        }
        .hero__badge {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 8px;
          padding: 8px 16px;
          background: var(--tcl-orange-dim);
          border: 1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.3);
          border-radius: 100px;
          font-size: 12px;
          font-weight: 600;
          letter-spacing: 0.1em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
        }
        .hero__badge--software {
          background: var(--tcl-green-dim);
          border-color: rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
          color: var(--tcl-green);
        }
        .hero__eyebrow {
          font-size: 13px;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: 0.18em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
          margin-bottom: 12px;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.05s both;
        }
        .hero__title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: clamp(52px, 9vw, 92px);
          font-weight: 400;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          line-height: 0.95;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          margin-bottom: 8px;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.1s both;
        }
        .hero__title span { color: var(--tcl-orange); }
        .hero__subtitle {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: clamp(18px, 3vw, 26px);
          letter-spacing: 0.08em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
          margin-bottom: 24px;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.12s both;
        }
        .hero__tagline {
          font-size: 20px;
          font-weight: 500;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          line-height: 1.5;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.15s both;
        }
        .hero__desc {
          font-size: 17px;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
          max-width: 640px;
          line-height: 1.7;
          margin-bottom: 32px;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.2s both;
        }
        .hero__ctas {
          display: flex;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 16px;
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.25s both;
        }
        .hero__cta {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          padding: 16px 32px;
          background: var(--tcl-orange);
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          font-family: var(--font-body);
          font-size: 15px;
          font-weight: 700;
          color: var(--tcl-black);
          text-decoration: none;
          transition: all 0.25s var(--ease-out);
        }
        .hero__cta:hover {
          background: #ffb940;
          transform: translateY(-3px);
          box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(245,166,35,0.35);
        }
        .hero__cta--outline {
          background: transparent;
          border: 2px solid var(--tcl-border-light);
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
        }
        .hero__cta--outline:hover {
          border-color: var(--tcl-orange);
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
          background: transparent;
          box-shadow: none;
        }
        .hero__cta svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
        .hero__meta {
          display: flex;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 24px;
          margin-top: 40px;
          padding-top: 32px;
          border-top: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.3s both;
        }
        .hero__meta-item {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          font-size: 14px;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
        }
        .hero__meta-item svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--tcl-orange); }
        .hero__software-callout {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 10px;
          margin-top: 20px;
          padding: 12px 20px;
          background: var(--tcl-green-dim);
          border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.25);
          border-radius: 10px;
          font-size: 13px;
          font-weight: 600;
          color: var(--tcl-green);
          animation: fadeSlideUp 0.8s var(--ease-out) 0.35s both;
        }
        .hero__software-callout svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
        @keyframes fadeSlideUp {
          from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
          to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        /* ── SECTIONS ─────────────────────────────────── */
        .section { padding: 100px 24px; }
        .section--dark { background: var(--tcl-dark); }
        .section--darker { background: var(--tcl-black); }
        .section-header { text-align: center; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 60px; }
        .section-eyebrow {
          display: inline-block;
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
          font-size: 12px;
          font-weight: 700;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.15em;
          margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .section-title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 52px);
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          line-height: 1;
          margin-bottom: 16px;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
        }
        .section-title span { color: var(--tcl-orange); }
        .section-desc { font-size: 16px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.6; }

        /* ── SOFTWARE BANNER ──────────────────────────── */
        .software-banner {
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tcl-dark-mid) 0%, rgba(16,185,129,0.08) 100%);
          border-top: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2);
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2);
          padding: 28px 24px;
        }
        .software-banner__inner {
          max-width: 1100px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-between;
          gap: 24px;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .software-banner__left {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 20px;
        }
        .software-banner__icon {
          width: 52px;
          height: 52px;
          background: var(--tcl-green-dim);
          border-radius: 12px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          font-size: 26px;
          flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .software-banner__title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 22px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
        }
        .software-banner__sub {
          font-size: 13px;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
          margin-top: 2px;
        }
        .software-banner__badge {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 8px;
          padding: 10px 20px;
          background: var(--tcl-green);
          border-radius: 100px;
          font-size: 13px;
          font-weight: 700;
          color: var(--tcl-white);
          white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /* ── LEARN GRID ───────────────────────────────── */
        .learn-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
          gap: 24px;
          max-width: 1100px;
          margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .learn-card {
          background: var(--tcl-dark-mid);
          border: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
          border-radius: 16px;
          padding: 32px;
          transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-out);
        }
        .learn-card:hover {
          border-color: rgba(245,166,35,0.25);
          transform: translateY(-4px);
        }
        .learn-card__icon {
          width: 48px;
          height: 48px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          background: var(--tcl-orange-dim);
          border-radius: 10px;
          margin-bottom: 20px;
          font-size: 24px;
        }
        .learn-card__title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 22px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          margin-bottom: 10px;
          color: var(--tcl-white);
        }
        .learn-card__desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.6; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .learn-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

        /* ── FEATURES ─────────────────────────────────── */
        .features {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 32px;
          max-width: 1100px;
          margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .feature { text-align: center; padding: 32px 24px; }
        .feature__icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .feature__title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 24px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          margin-bottom: 12px;
          color: var(--tcl-white);
        }
        .feature__desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.6; }
        @media (max-width: 900px) { .features { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; } }

        /* ── SYLLABUS ─────────────────────────────────── */
        .syllabus { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .module {
          background: var(--tcl-dark-mid);
          border: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
          border-radius: 12px;
          margin-bottom: 12px;
          overflow: hidden;
          transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
        }
        .module:hover { border-color: var(--tcl-border-light); }
        .module__header {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 20px;
          padding: 24px 28px;
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: background 0.2s ease;
        }
        .module__header:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }
        .module__number {
          width: 44px;
          height: 44px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          background: var(--tcl-orange-dim);
          border-radius: 10px;
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 20px;
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
          flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .module__number--bonus {
          font-size: 14px;
          background: var(--tcl-green-dim);
          color: var(--tcl-green);
        }
        .module__title { flex: 1; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tcl-cream); }
        .module__toggle {
          width: 24px;
          height: 24px;
          color: var(--tcl-gray);
          transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease-out);
        }
        .module.is-open .module__toggle { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .module__body { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.4s var(--ease-out); }
        .module__content { padding: 0 28px 24px 92px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.7; }

        /* ── INSTRUCTOR ───────────────────────────────── */
        .instructor {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
          gap: 48px;
          align-items: center;
          max-width: 1000px;
          margin: 0 auto;
          background: var(--tcl-dark-mid);
          border: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
          border-radius: 20px;
          padding: 48px;
        }
        .instructor__img {
          width: 100%;
          aspect-ratio: 1;
          border-radius: 16px;
          overflow: hidden;
          background: var(--tcl-dark-light);
        }
        .instructor__img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
        .instructor__eyebrow {
          font-size: 12px;
          font-weight: 700;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.15em;
          color: var(--tcl-orange);
          margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .instructor__name {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 36px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .instructor__bio { font-size: 15px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.7; }
        @media (max-width: 800px) {
          .instructor { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; padding: 32px; }
          .instructor__img { max-width: 200px; margin: 0 auto; }
        }

        /* ── PRICING ──────────────────────────────────── */
        .pricing {
          position: relative;
          padding: 120px 24px;
          background: var(--tcl-dark);
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        .pricing::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          top: 0;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translateX(-50%);
          width: 150%;
          height: 100%;
          background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, var(--tcl-orange-dim) 0%, transparent 50%);
          pointer-events: none;
        }
        .pricing__inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
        .pricing__guarantee {
          max-width: 800px;
          margin: 0 auto 60px;
          text-align: center;
          padding: 32px;
          background: var(--tcl-green-dim);
          border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
          border-radius: 16px;
        }
        .pricing__guarantee-badge {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 8px;
          padding: 6px 14px;
          background: var(--tcl-green);
          border-radius: 100px;
          font-size: 11px;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: 0.1em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          color: var(--tcl-white);
          margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .pricing__guarantee-title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 28px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .pricing__guarantee-text { font-size: 15px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.6; }
        .price-card {
          background: var(--tcl-dark-mid);
          border: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
          border-radius: 20px;
          padding: 40px 32px;
          text-align: center;
          transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-out);
          position: relative;
        }
        .price-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: var(--tcl-border-light); }
        .price-card--featured {
          border-color: var(--tcl-orange);
          background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(245,166,35,0.08) 0%, var(--tcl-dark-mid) 100%);
        }
        .price-card--featured:hover { border-color: var(--tcl-orange); }
        .price-card__badge {
          position: absolute;
          top: -14px;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translateX(-50%);
          padding: 6px 20px;
          background: var(--tcl-orange);
          border-radius: 100px;
          font-size: 11px;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: 0.1em;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          color: var(--tcl-black);
          white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .price-card__users {
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: 600;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.1em;
          margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .price-card__price {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: 56px;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          line-height: 1;
          margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        .price-card__price sup { font-size: 28px; vertical-align: super; }
        .price-card__per { font-size: 13px; color: var(--tcl-gray); margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .price-card__features { text-align: left; margin-bottom: 28px; }
        .price-card__feature {
          display: flex;
          align-items: flex-start;
          gap: 12px;
          padding: 10px 0;
          font-size: 14px;
          color: var(--tcl-gray-light);
          border-bottom: 1px solid var(--tcl-border);
        }
        .price-card__feature:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .price-card__feature svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; color: var(--tcl-green); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }
        .price-card__cta {
          display: block;
          width: 100%;
          padding: 16px 24px;
          background: var(--tcl-orange);
          border: none;
          border-radius: 10px;
          font-family: var(--font-body);
          font-size: 15px;
          font-weight: 700;
          color: var(--tcl-black);
          text-decoration: none;
          transition: all 0.25s var(--ease-out);
        }
        .price-card__cta:hover {
          background: #ffb940;
          transform: translateY(-2px);
          box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(245,166,35,0.3);
        }

        /* ── FAQ ──────────────────────────────────────── */
        .faq-list { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .faq-item { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--tcl-border); }
        .faq-item__question {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-between;
          gap: 20px;
          width: 100%;
          padding: 24px 0;
          background: none;
          border: none;
          font-family: var(--font-body);
          font-size: 17px;
          font-weight: 600;
          color: var(--tcl-cream);
          text-align: left;
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }
        .faq-item__question:hover { color: var(--tcl-orange); }
        .faq-item__question svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--tcl-gray); flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease-out); }
        .faq-item.is-open .faq-item__question svg { transform: rotate(45deg); }
        .faq-item__answer { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.4s var(--ease-out); }
        .faq-item__answer-inner { padding-bottom: 24px; font-size: 15px; color: var(--tcl-gray-light); line-height: 1.7; }

        /* ── FINAL CTA ────────────────────────────────── */
        .final-cta {
          position: relative;
          padding: 120px 24px;
          text-align: center;
          overflow: hidden;
          background:
            linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,12,16,0.92) 0%, rgba(10,12,16,0.88) 100%),
            url('https://trafficcoplabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ready107-hero-image.png') center/cover no-repeat fixed;
        }
        .final-cta::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, var(--tcl-orange-dim) 0%, transparent 60%);
          pointer-events: none;
        }
        .final-cta__content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .final-cta__title {
          font-family: var(--font-display);
          font-size: clamp(40px, 7vw, 64px);

              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                What's included in the 180-day online access?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">All course materials, study guides, practice exams, and test prep software. You can review sectional chart exercises, practice weather interpretation, and take unlimited practice tests that mirror the actual FAA exam format and difficulty level.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                Do I need any aviation background to attend?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">None required. READY 107 is designed for complete beginners to aviation. We build the knowledge from the ground up, explaining aviation concepts in plain English with law enforcement contexts that make sense to you. Most of our students have zero aviation background when they start.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                What does the First-Try Pass Guarantee cover?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">If you attend the full 2-day course and don't pass the FAA Part 107 exam on your first attempt, we'll provide additional one-on-one coaching and retraining at no charge until you do pass. We're confident in our approach and stand behind it.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                Can my agency send multiple attendees?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">Absolutely — register as many seats as you need at the flat per-student rate. Group discounts may be available for 5+ students from the same agency. If your agency wants to host a private READY 107 session, contact us about bringing the course directly to you.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                Is lodging or travel assistance available?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">We don't book lodging, but we provide a recommended hotels list near each training site with every registration confirmation. Many agencies use this course to fulfill training budget requirements and cover travel and per diem — we can provide the documentation your finance or admin team needs.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
              <button class="faq-item__question">
                What if I need to cancel my registration?
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line></svg>
              </button>
              <div class="faq-item__answer">
                <div class="faq-item__answer-inner">Cancellations made 30 or more days before the course start date receive a full refund minus a 3% processing fee. Cancellations within 30 days can transfer their seat to a colleague at no charge, or apply the registration credit toward a future READY 107 session. Contact us and we'll work something out.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    `;

    // ── API CONSTANTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    const PROXY_URL    = 'https://training.trafficcoplabs.com/api/generate-letter/';
    const CRM_URL      = 'https://crm.trafficcoplabs.com/api/letter-lead/';
    const PRODUCTS_URL = 'https://crm.trafficcoplabs.com/api/products/';

    // Event registry — add new READY 107 sessions here as they're scheduled
    const READY107_EVENTS = {
      'ready107-prosperity-jun2026': {
        label: 'Prosperity, SC — June 1–2, 2026',
        product_name: 'READY 107 — Prosperity SC',
      },
    };

    let generatedLetter = '';
    let ready107ProductId = '';

    // Silently resolve product ID for CRM payload
    async function prefetchProductId() {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch(PRODUCTS_URL);
        const data = await res.json();
        const ready107 = (data.courses || []).find(c =>
          c.name.toLowerCase().includes('ready 107') || c.name.toLowerCase().includes('part 107') || c.name.toLowerCase().includes('remote pilot')
        );
        if (ready107) ready107ProductId = ready107.id;
      } catch {}
    }
    prefetchProductId();

    // ── LETTER GENERATION ─────────────────────────────────────────
    async function generateJustificationLetter() {
      const name       = shadow.getElementById('jk_name').value.trim();
      const email      = shadow.getElementById('jk_email').value.trim();
      const department = shadow.getElementById('jk_department').value.trim();
      const supervisor = shadow.getElementById('jk_supervisor').value.trim();
      const eventId    = shadow.getElementById('jk_event').value;

      if (!name || !email || !department || !supervisor) {
        alert('Please fill in your name, email, department, and supervisor name.');
        return;
      }

      const btn = shadow.getElementById('jk_btn');
      btn.disabled = true;
      shadow.getElementById('jk_btn_label').style.display = 'none';
      shadow.getElementById('jk_btn_loading').style.display = 'flex';

      const payload = {
        name, email, department,
        rank: shadow.getElementById('jk_rank').value.trim(),
        supervisor_name: supervisor,
        supervisor_title: shadow.getElementById('jk_sup_title').value.trim(),
        letter_type: 'training',
        product_id: ready107ProductId || '',
        event_id: eventId,
        hardware_description: '',
        additional_context: shadow.getElementById('jk_context').value.trim(),
      };

      try {
        const res  = await fetch(PROXY_URL, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.letter) {
          generatedLetter = data.letter;
          shadow.getElementById('jk_letter_output').textContent = data.letter;
          shadow.getElementById('jk_output_wrap').classList.add('visible');
          shadow.getElementById('jk_output_wrap').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
          const eventInfo = READY107_EVENTS[eventId] || {};
          fetch(CRM_URL, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ ...payload, product_name: eventInfo.product_name || 'READY 107', generated_letter: data.letter })
          }).catch(() => {});
        } else {
          alert('Error: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error'));
        }
      } catch (err) {
        alert('Failed to reach the server. Please try again.');
      } finally {
        btn.disabled = false;
        shadow.getElementById('jk_btn_label').style.display = 'flex';
        shadow.getElementById('jk_btn_loading').style.display = 'none';
      }
    }

    function copyJustificationLetter() {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(generatedLetter).then(() => {
        const btn = shadow.getElementById('jk_copy_btn');
        const orig = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px;"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline></svg> Copied!';
        setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = orig; }, 2000);
      });
    }

    async function downloadJustificationDocx() {
      if (!generatedLetter) {
        alert('Please generate a letter first.');
        return;
      }

      const btn = shadow.getElementById('jk_download_btn');
      const origHTML = btn.innerHTML;
      
      try {
        // Show loading state
        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.innerHTML = '<div style="width:13px;height:13px;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border-top-color:#000;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.7s linear infinite;"></div> Creating...';
        
        // Use server-side Word generation (like your test file)
        const response = await fetch('https://training.trafficcoplabs.com/api/letter-to-docx/', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ letter: generatedLetter })
        });

        if (response.ok) {
          const blob = await response.blob();
          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
          const link = document.createElement('a');
          link.href = url;
          link.download = 'ready107-justification-letter.docx';
          link.click();
          URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
          
          // Show success
          btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:13px;height:13px;"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline></svg> Downloaded!';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.innerHTML = origHTML;
            btn.disabled = false;
          }, 2000);
        } else {
          throw new Error('Server failed to generate Word document');
        }

      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Word download error:', error);
        
        btn.innerHTML = origHTML;
        btn.disabled = false;
        
        // Fallback to copy
        if (confirm('Word download failed. Would you like to copy the letter text instead?')) {
          copyJustificationLetter();
        }
      }
    }

    shadow.getElementById('jk_btn').addEventListener('click', generateJustificationLetter);
    shadow.getElementById('jk_copy_btn').addEventListener('click', copyJustificationLetter);
    shadow.getElementById('jk_download_btn').addEventListener('click', downloadJustificationDocx);

    // ANCHOR NAVIGATION — hash links inside Shadow DOM
    shadow.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const targetId = link.getAttribute('href').substring(1);
        const target = shadow.getElementById(targetId);
        if (target) {
          const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
          window.scrollTo({ top: window.scrollY + rect.top, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
      });
    });

    // MODULE ACCORDION
    const modules = shadow.querySelectorAll('.module');
    modules.forEach(mod => {
      const header = mod.querySelector('.module__header');
      const body = mod.querySelector('.module__body');
      header.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const isOpen = mod.classList.contains('is-open');
        modules.forEach(m => {
          m.classList.remove('is-open');
          m.querySelector('.module__body').style.maxHeight = '0';
        });
        if (!isOpen) {
          mod.classList.add('is-open');
          body.style.maxHeight = body.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }
      });
    });

    // FAQ ACCORDION
    const faqs = shadow.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
    faqs.forEach(faq => {
      const question = faq.querySelector('.faq-item__question');
      const answer = faq.querySelector('.faq-item__answer');
      question.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const isOpen = faq.classList.contains('is-open');
        faqs.forEach(f => {
          f.classList.remove('is-open');
          f.querySelector('.faq-item__answer').style.maxHeight = '0';
        });
        if (!isOpen) {
          faq.classList.add('is-open');
          answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }
      });
    });
  }
}

customElements.define('tcl-ready107-inperson-page', TCLReady107InpersonPage);
</script>
